mapper.insert: insert into jst_event_partner( partner_name, contact_name, contact_mobile, business_license_no, qualification_json, settlement_info_json, invoice_info_json, contract_files_json, audit_status, audit_time, audit_remark, account_status, coop_status, create_by, create_time, del_flag ) values ( #{partner.partnerName}, #{partner.contactName}, #{partner.contactMobile}, #{partner.businessLicenseNo}, #{partner.qualificationJson}, #{partner.settlementInfoJson}, #{partner.invoiceInfoJson}, #{partner.contractFilesJson}, #{partner.auditStatus}, #{partner.auditTime}, #{partner.auditRemark}, #{partner.accountStatus}, #{partner.coopStatus}, #{partner.createBy}, #{partner.createTime}, #{partner.delFlag} )
